entities.name: CROPLAND EXTENT MAPS
entities.description: Maps used for assessing food security and calculating cropland area across various spatial units from individual farms to nations

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Countrywide data used to calculate cropland area and estimate agricultural productivity

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, which can be estimated using cropland extent maps

entities.name: NATURAL DISASTERS
entities.description: Environmental events that can cause disturbance to food security

entities.name: POLITICAL CONFLICT
entities.description: Human-driven events that can cause disturbance to food security

entities.name: SOUTHEAST AND NORTHEAST ASIAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: The geographic region of the study, comprising 12 countries in Southeast and Northeast Asia

entities.name: REFINED AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Seven spatial zones used to generate data-cubes and reference training data for cropland mapping

entities.name: LANDSAT 8 OPERATIONAL LAND IMAGER
entities.description: A satellite sensor providing 30-m multi-year time-series data for cropland mapping

entities.name: LANDSAT 7 ENHANCED THEMATIC MAPPER
entities.description: A satellite sensor providing 30-m multi-year time-series data for cropland mapping

entities.name: SPECTRAL BANDS
entities.description: Ten Landsat bands including blue, green, red, NIR, SWIR1, SWIR2, Thermal, NDVI, NDWI, and LSWI used as input features

entities.name: GLOBAL DIGITAL ELEVATION MODEL
entities.description: A data source used to derive slope and elevation bands for the analysis

entities.name: VERY HIGH SPATIAL RESOLUTION IMAGERY
entities.description: Sub-meter to 5-m imagery used to generate the reference training data to separate croplands from non-croplands

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST CLASSIFIER
entities.description: A supervised machine learning algorithm used to separate croplands from non-croplands

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE
entities.description: A cloud computing environment used to execute the random forest classifier

entities.name: UNITED NATIONS FOOD AND AGRICULTURE ORGANIZATION
entities.description: An organization providing national cropland statistics for validation of the resulting products

entities.name: NATIONAL AERONAUTICS AND SPACE ADMINISTRATION
entities.description: An organization that hosts the cropland products via the Land Processes Distributed Active Archive Center

relationships.description: provides slope and elevation features for
used to create training data for

relationships.source: UNITED NATIONS FOOD AND AGRICULTURE ORGANIZATION
